# Documentation freshness allowlist.
# One pattern per line, fnmatch globs. Lines starting with '#' are comments.
# Filters tokens that pass the camel-case-or-period candidate check but are
# not real symbols (filenames, framework attributes, library names, CSS values).

# Filename references in backticks
*.md
*.html
*.py
*.css
*.js
*.json
*.yml
*.yaml
*.toml
*.svg
*.png

# CSS values
currentColor

# Library / package names referenced in narrative prose
PyJWT

# Keyboard arrow keys
Arrow*

# GitHub Actions input keys referenced in docs
allowedTools

# FastAPI / Starlette request attribute paths
request.state
request.session
